# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET', defaultValue: '', description: 'Target production server IP or hostname')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFile = "artifact-$(new Date().time).zip"
                    sh "wget -O ${artifactFile} ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sshagent(['your-ssh-key-id']) {
                        sh """
                            scp ${artifactFile} user@${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}:/path/to/deploy
                            ssh user@${params.DEPLOY_TARGET} 'unzip -o /path/to/deploy/artifact-$(new Date().time).zip && rm /path/to/deploy/artifact-$(new Date().time).zip'
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
